name: MAT_chrIII_active
description: Active mating-type locus MAT on chr III. Carries either MATa or MATalpha allele (~700-750 bp Ya or Yalpha cassette flanked by W, X, Z1, Z2 homology regions). The allele determines cell identity and is expressed.
expected_copy_count: 1 active MAT + 2 silent (HML, HMR) cassettes, all on chr III
